deep_dive.title: MAC-Splat: Multi-Attribute Consistency for High-Fidelity Sparse-View Reconstruction
deep_dive.abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse-views remains a central problem in generalizable neural rendering. Existing generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods often exhibit geometric artifacts in sparse-view settings, since supervision based solely on 2D photometric losses cannot resolve depth and correspondence ambiguities. To address this issue, we propose MAC-Splat, a training framework built around direct 3D consistency supervision. MAC-Splat builds on the MASt3R geometric backbone and a frozen DINOv3 encoder to obtain semantically informed 2D correspondences, which serve as geometric anchors for 3D supervision. Using these anchors, we define the Multi-Attribute Consistency (MAC) loss. This objective jointly regularizes the 3D attributes of matched Gaussians, including their position, shape, and appearance, by enforcing agreement in a common world coordinate frame. The formulation is robust to outliers and respects the geometry of covariance matrices, which leads to stable training under sparse-view conditions. Experiments on ScanNet++ show that MAC-Splat outperforms strong baselines, with particularly large gains under different overlap regimes. In particular, it improves average PSNR over Splatt3R by more than 4.5 dB, reduces LPIPS, and maintains performance as the camera pose gap increases. These results indicate that a direct, multi-attribute 3D consistency objective, when combined with high-quality correspondences, is effective for addressing the ill-posed sparse-view reconstruction problem.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward neural network for 3D reconstruction from sparse views
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈神经网络用于稀疏视图三维重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 前馈神经网络用于稀疏视图三维重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 前馈神经网络用于稀疏视图三维重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MAC-Splat proposes a training framework with direct 3D consistency supervision to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse views, outperforming existing generalizable 3DGS methods.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有可泛化3D高斯溅射方法在稀疏视图下几何伪影问题，本文提出MAC-Splat，通过直接三维一致性监督框架，利用MASt3R几何骨干和DINOv3编码器获取语义对应作为几何锚点，定义多属性一致性损失。实验表明该方法有效提升了稀疏视图重建的保真度，为前馈式三维重建提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: FoundationGeo: Learning Spatial Pixel-Wise Fields for Monocular Metric Geometry
deep_dive.abstract: We present FoundationGeo, a two-stage framework that explicitly bridges relative and metric prediction via spatial calibration and principled data design. Stage 1 learns a high-fidelity, affine-invariant geometry model by initializing with DINOv3 and training on a curated 10.2M-sample multi-domain corpus with complementary local-detail supervision, yielding sharp boundaries and strong cross-domain generalization. Stage 2 moves beyond global scaling by introducing lightweight pixel-wise calibration fields for metric estimation: a scale field for spatially varying metric alignment and a ray-direction correction field that mitigates directional bias in point-map geometry, together producing metrically consistent 3D point maps. Beyond model design, we identify camera intrinsic coverage, especially focal length distribution mismatch between training and test data, as a key bottleneck for zero-shot metric generalization: performance drops sharply when test intrinsics fall outside the training distribution. To address this, we synthesize additional training data across diverse focal lengths using a Blender-based data engine, repairing under-covered focal regimes and improving robustness under intrinsic shift. Extensive zero-shot evaluations across seven benchmarks show that FoundationGeo significantly strengthens cross-domain robustness, staying near the top across diverse domains while avoiding the sharp cross-domain performance drops observed in other methods. This consistency translates into the best overall performance, surpassing heavier baselines by over 5.2% on average.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward monocular metric geometry estimation using pixel-wise fields
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用像素场的前馈单目度量几何估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用像素场的前馈单目度量几何估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用像素场的前馈单目度量几何估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FoundationGeo is a two-stage framework that first learns an affine-invariant geometry model from large-scale data, then introduces pixel-wise calibration fields for metric 3D point map estimation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 单目度量几何预测面临跨域泛化和度量估计难题。本文提出FoundationGeo，两阶段框架：第一阶段从大规模多域数据学习高保真仿射不变几何模型，第二阶段引入像素级校准场（尺度场和射线方向校正场）实现度量一致的三维点图。实验表明该方法在多个基准上达到SOTA，为前馈式单目几何理解确立了新基线。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 单目度量几何预测面临跨域泛化和度量估计难题。本文提出FoundationGeo，两阶段框架：第一阶段从大规模多域数据学习高保真仿射不变几何模型，第二阶段引入像素级校准场（尺度场和射线方向校正场）实现度量一致的三维点图。实验表明该方法在多个基准上达到SOTA，为前馈式单目几何理解确立了新基线。

deep_dive.title: See like a Robot: Robot-Centric Pointmaps for Vision-Language-Action Models
deep_dive.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models predict robot actions from visual observations and language instructions. These actions are defined in the robot's own 3D coordinate frame, yet most VLAs observe the scene in the camera frame, creating a frame mismatch between where the scene is observed and where actions are defined. The mismatch is benign under a fixed viewpoint, where the policy can memorize a single observation-to-action mapping, but grows harder as large-scale datasets aggregate demonstrations across diverse camera setups and the policy must generalize this mapping across viewpoints. We address this mismatch with robot-centric pointmaps, images whose pixels store the 3D coordinates of scene points in the robot frame. Pointmaps provide robot-frame 3D geometry while preserving the dense H x W grid expected by pretrained 2D VLAs, so they integrate into existing VLAs with minimal architectural change. On RoboCasa, pointmaps improve both pi0.5 and SmolVLA and outperform representative camera-viewpoint and 3D-aware baselines. In real-robot experiments, their advantage over an RGB-only policy widens when the camera is moved to a placement unseen during training.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: direct pixel-to-3D coordinate mapping via robot-centric pointmaps
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过机器人中心点图实现像素到3D坐标的直接映射
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过机器人中心点图实现像素到3D坐标的直接映射
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过机器人中心点图实现像素到3D坐标的直接映射
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Robot-centric pointmaps provide a direct mapping from image pixels to 3D coordinates in the robot frame, enabling VLA models to generalize across camera viewpoints.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型在观测坐标系与动作坐标系之间存在不匹配问题，限制了跨视角泛化。本文提出机器人中心点图，将像素存储为机器人坐标系中的3D坐标，实现从像素到3D几何的直接映射。该方法使模型能够从任意视角推理，显著提升了跨视角的泛化能力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 视觉-语言-动作模型在观测坐标系与动作坐标系之间存在不匹配问题，限制了跨视角泛化。本文提出机器人中心点图，将像素存储为机器人坐标系中的3D坐标，实现从像素到3D几何的直接映射。该方法使模型能够从任意视角推理，显著提升了跨视角的泛化能力。

deep_dive.title: ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space
deep_dive.abstract: We present ABot-3DWorld 0, a universal multimodal 3D world model that turns text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D worlds. At the heart of our framework is a unified Spatial Generative Primitive (SGP), a compact tuple of a high-quality panorama and a spatial point cloud that delivers an efficient description of any 3D space. Multimodal inputs are first lifted into this primitive; a 3D-consistent panoramic video generator then explores the primitive along a planned trajectory; finally, our panoramic video reconstruction engine converts the generated video into a clean, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) world. This pipeline covers two regimes: rich inputs (multi-view sets, casual video) are lifted into the SGP through a geometry-rigorous recovery that mirrors the observed scene, while a single image or sentence is completed generatively into a creative world. The result is one low-barrier engine for general 3D content creation that further anchors generated worlds to geographic points of interest, enabling map-native spatial exploration at consumer scale. Experiments show that ABot-3DWorld 0 sets the state of the art among open-source methods and demonstrates stronger scene fidelity than Marble under rich multimodal inputs.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: generates high-fidelity explorable 3D worlds from multimodal inputs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 从多模态输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 从多模态输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 从多模态输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ABot-3DWorld 0 is a universal world model that converts text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D Gaussian Splatting worlds using a Spatial Generative Primitive and panoramic video generation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D生成方法往往局限于特定输入模态或生成质量不高。本文提出ABot-3DWorld 0，一种通用多模态3D世界模型，能够将文本、图像和视频输入转化为高保真、可探索的3D高斯泼溅世界。其核心是统一的空间生成基元（全景图+点云），通过3D一致全景视频生成和重建流水线实现高质量3D场景生成。实验表明该方法在多种输入条件下均能生成逼真的可交互3D世界，为3D内容创作提供了通用解决方案。

deep_dive.title: ThinkBLOX: 3D Indoor Scene Generation with Progressive Reasoning
deep_dive.abstract: While traditional graphics methods often synthesize 3D indoor scenes autoregressively or hierarchically, recent vision-language model (VLM)-based generators predominantly adopt a one-shot paradigm where the full layout is planned at once. This one-shot approach often requires global re-optimization or complete reconstruction during interactive editing (e.g., inserting or moving objects) and can lead to physically or semantically poorly organized arrangements. To address these challenges, we propose ThinkBLOX, a VLM-based progressive reasoning framework that iteratively designs and refines 3D scenes. ThinkBLOX treats layout generation as a state-conditioned, step-by-step reasoningand-action process. To power this, we construct the ThinkBLOX-Data-200K dataset, containing 224,757 procedural placement pairs annotated with multi-view scene context, explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) rationales, and structured JSON layouts. Through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on this dataset, the VLM learns to bridge the reasoning-action gap under incremental updates. Furthermore, recognizing that scene synthesis is inherently a multisolution task where SFT suffers from reward conflict, we introduce Tier-Decoupled GDPO. This reinforcement learning scheme organizes heterogeneous rewards into distinct tiers, stabilizing policy optimization across physical validity, semantic plausibility, and reasoning-action consistency. Extensive experiments show that ThinkBLOX significantly outperforms recent one-shot and iterative baselines in physical plausibility, semantic alignment, and interactive editability. Additionally, we show that it supports diverse applications, including both global and local generation and rearrangement of 3D scenes.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: generative 3D modeling and synthesis using progressive VLM reasoning for indoor scenes
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用渐进VLM推理进行室内场景生成式3D建模与合成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用渐进VLM推理进行室内场景生成式3D建模与合成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用渐进VLM推理进行室内场景生成式3D建模与合成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ThinkBLOX proposes a VLM-based progressive reasoning framework for 3D indoor scene generation, treating layout design as a step-by-step reasoning-and-action process to enable interactive editing and physically plausible arrangements.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: ThinkBLOX提出了一种基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的渐进推理框架，用于3D室内场景生成。它将布局生成视为状态条件的分步推理与行动过程，从而支持交互式编辑并避免全局重优化。框架包含ThinkBLOX-Data-200K数据集。实验表明，该方法能生成物理和语义上更合理的场景布局，相比一次性方法具有更好的可编辑性和组织质量。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: ThinkBLOX提出了一种基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的渐进推理框架，用于3D室内场景生成。它将布局生成视为状态条件的分步推理与行动过程，从而支持交互式编辑并避免全局重优化。框架包含ThinkBLOX-Data-200K数据集。实验表明，该方法能生成物理和语义上更合理的场景布局，相比一次性方法具有更好的可编辑性和组织质量。

deep_dive.title: Nexus: Native Mesh Generation with Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: Generating high-quality triangle meshes is essential for film, gaming, and interactive 3D applications. Mainstream methods rely on mesh serialization and autoregressive processes, which stuggles in effective inference and is sensitive to error accumulation. In this paper, we present Nexus, a diffusion method that achieves holistic mesh generation via decoupled vertex and topology generation. First, we view mesh vertices as sparse voxels organized as an octree and adopt a diffusion model to generate the vertices in a coarse-to-fine manner. Second, for topology modeling, we propose Spacetime Interval, as an extension of Spacetime Distance to encode arbitrary edge and face topology into continuous per-vertex embeddings. It allows for a global and efficient recovery of complex topology. We then employ a diffusion model to generate the continuous embeddings on the generated vertices. Extensive experiments on the Objaverse and Toys4K datasets and in-the-wild images demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art autoregressive and two-stage baselines, effectively circumventing the inherent limitations of sequential mesh modeling. A blind user study from 3D practitioners confirms strong perceptual preference for our results.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Generates high-quality triangle meshes using diffusion with decoupled vertex and topology generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用扩散模型解耦顶点和拓扑生成，输出高质量三角网格
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用扩散模型解耦顶点和拓扑生成，输出高质量三角网格
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用扩散模型解耦顶点和拓扑生成，输出高质量三角网格
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Nexus, a diffusion method for holistic mesh generation by decoupling vertex and topology, using octree-based coarse-to-fine vertex diffusion and Spacetime Interval for topology encoding.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 高质量三角网格生成对影视、游戏等3D应用至关重要。现有方法依赖于网格序列化和自回归过程，推理效率低且易误差累积。本文提出Nexus，一种扩散方法，通过解耦顶点和拓扑生成实现整体网格生成。首先将网格顶点视为八叉树组织的稀疏体素，采用扩散模型从粗到细生成顶点；然后提出Spacetime Interval作为Spacetime Distance的扩展，将任意边和面拓扑编码为连续的点嵌入，从而全局高效地恢复复杂拓扑。实验证明Nexus在网格生成质量和多样性上优于现有方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 高质量三角网格生成对影视、游戏等3D应用至关重要。现有方法依赖于网格序列化和自回归过程，推理效率低且易误差累积。本文提出Nexus，一种扩散方法，通过解耦顶点和拓扑生成实现整体网格生成。首先将网格顶点视为八叉树组织的稀疏体素，采用扩散模型从粗到细生成顶点；然后提出Spacetime Interval作为Spacetime Distance的扩展，将任意边和面拓扑编码为连续的点嵌入，从而全局高效地恢复复杂拓扑。实验证明Nexus在网格生成质量和多样性上优于现有方法。

deep_dive.title: MetaView: Monocular Novel View Synthesis with Scale-Aware Implicit Geometry Priors
deep_dive.abstract: Current visual generation models are capable of producing high-quality content, yet they lack a coherent perception of the spatial structure. Existing generative novel view synthesis methods typically introduce explicit geometry priors, which enforce spatial consistency but inherently restrict generalization in large view changes. In contrast, recent interactive generative methods favor implicit scene modeling, offering greater flexibility at the cost of precise camera control and geometry consistency. In this paper, we propose MetaView, a diffusion-based monocular novel view synthesis framework that enables rendering under large view changes from a single image. Our key insight is to combine implicit geometry modeling with minimal yet essential explicit 3D cues: we incorporate implicit geometry priors from a feed-forward geometry perception network to regularize structure without imposing restrictive reconstruction pipelines, while leveraging metric depth to anchor the generation to a metric scale. This design allows MetaView to achieve both geometry consistency and precise controllability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, under challenging monocular large viewpoint changes, MetaView significantly outperforms existing methods and exhibits superior generalization. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/KlingAIResearch/MetaView.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: diffusion-based monocular novel view synthesis with implicit geometry priors
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于扩散和隐式几何先验的单目新视图合成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于扩散和隐式几何先验的单目新视图合成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于扩散和隐式几何先验的单目新视图合成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MetaView combines implicit geometry modeling with minimal explicit priors for novel view synthesis under large view changes from a single image.

deep_dive.title: Compos3D: Interactive Part-Based Composition for Creative Control in Generative 3D Models
deep_dive.abstract: While generative AI has unlocked new opportunities for 3D content creation, current workflows often rely on multiple regenerations, which provides limited control and unpredictable outcomes. We present Compos3D, a system that introduces a compositional workflow for generative 3D modeling through remixing. Instead of repeatedly regenerating models, users generate multiple candidates from text or image prompts, select parts of interest via 2D image regions or 3D mesh segments, and assemble them into a coherent design. The system synthesizes these compositions into a refined 3D model, preserving high-level intent while resolving low-level geometry. To evaluate this approach, we conducted a controlled user study comparing remixing and regeneration workflows across both 2D and 3D modalities. Results show that the remixing workflow provides participants with greater creative control, stronger alignment with their intent, and higher satisfaction. We conclude with design recommendations for future AI-assisted 3D modeling workflows.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Interactive part-based composition for generative 3D models from text/image prompts
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于部件组合的交互式生成3D模型，支持文本/图像提示
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于部件组合的交互式生成3D模型，支持文本/图像提示
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于部件组合的交互式生成3D模型，支持文本/图像提示
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Compos3D introduces a remixing workflow for generative 3D modeling, where users generate candidates from text or image prompts, select parts, and assemble them into a refined 3D model, offering creative control.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有生成式3D建模流程缺乏用户控制，往往需要多次生成。本文提出Compos3D系统，通过交互式部件组合实现创意控制：用户从文本或图像提示生成多个候选模型，选择感兴趣部件（通过2D图像区域或3D网格片段），然后组装成一个连贯设计。系统合成这些部件并优化几何细节。用户研究显示该方法相比传统重生成工作流提供了更好的可控性和输出质量。

quick_skim.title: DETRAM: End-to-end DEtection, Tracking and Recovery of HumAn Meshes
quick_skim.abstract: In the task of human mesh recovery (HMR), multi-person scenes are particularly difficult to handle due to the many entities that appear and occlusions between them over time. In particular for video inputs, there is a need to track each entity reliably and consistently. Existing methods rely on pretrained human detection modules, increasing their runtime and limiting the number of tracked entities. We present DETRAM, a unified framework for multi-person HMR and tracking that simultaneously detects, reconstructs, and tracks humans across time, both automatically and via user prompts. DETRAM uses a single transformer decoder with an identity-consistent set of learnable query embeddings that persist across frames: detection queries discover new people, tracking queries maintain pose and shape for existing individuals, and prompt queries follow user-specified identities. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art tracking results on PoseTrack21, 3DPW, BEDLAM, and MuPoTS-3D, and competitive reconstruction accuracy on BEDLAM and 3DPW, while uniquely supporting prompt-based tracking of individuals in multi-person scenes. To our knowledge, this is the first method to unify promptability and multi-person HMR with tracking in an end-to-end trainable framework, enabling user-directed human analysis in videos.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: End-to-end human mesh recovery from video using a single transformer decoder
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用单个Transformer解码器从视频端到端恢复人体网格
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用单个Transformer解码器从视频端到端恢复人体网格
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用单个Transformer解码器从视频端到端恢复人体网格
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DETRAM is a unified framework for multi-person human mesh recovery and tracking that uses a single transformer decoder with persistent query embeddings for simultaneous detection, reconstruction, and tracking.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 多人体网格恢复中，现有方法依赖预训练检测模块且运行时间长。DETRAM提出统一框架，使用单个Transformer解码器和身份一致性查询嵌入，同时进行检测、重建和跟踪。支持自动和用户提示，提高了效率和灵活性，能处理多人和遮挡场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 多人体网格恢复中，现有方法依赖预训练检测模块且运行时间长。DETRAM提出统一框架，使用单个Transformer解码器和身份一致性查询嵌入，同时进行检测、重建和跟踪。支持自动和用户提示，提高了效率和灵活性，能处理多人和遮挡场景。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: direct mapping from pixels to 3D geometry using feed-forward networks

quick_skim.title: Rethinking Monocular Depth Embedding for Generalized Stereo Matching
quick_skim.abstract: Generally, monocular methods capture rich contextual priors but lack geometric precision, whereas stereo methods are geometrically accurate yet struggle in textureless and occluded regions. Several approaches attempt to combine their strengths to enhance the generalization of stereo matching (SM) by aligning monocular depth with stereo information. However, establishing a stable and generalizable alignment is challenging, and unreliable monocular cues can substantially degrade performance. This paper rethinks monocular depth embedding. First, to prevent shortcut learning, we reduce branch coupling instead of expanding network width. Second, we construct soft constraints instead of hard ones from monocular depth to improve tolerance to monocular depth errors. Based on the principles, we integrate monocular information into both feature extraction and GRU iterations. Specifically, the monocular depth map is fused with the RGB image to sharpen depth boundary perception and suppress matching ambiguities. The fused image is then used for feature extraction, allowing the contextual features to encode global geometric information. Furthermore, the monocular depth gradient feature is employed to guide disparity updates, helping to escape local oscillations. Finally, to address the boundary blurring of supervised disparity caused by data augmentation, we propose an edge confidence estimation method and an edge-aware loss function. Our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on multiple standard benchmarks, demonstrating excellent generalization while improving accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/linliboabc-maker/stereo-matching-digital.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: monocular depth embedding as pixel-to-depth mapping
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 单目深度嵌入作为像素到深度的映射
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 单目深度嵌入作为像素到深度的映射
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 单目深度嵌入作为像素到深度的映射
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This work rethinks monocular depth embedding for stereo matching, reducing branch coupling and using soft constraints to improve tolerance to monocular errors.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 立体匹配在无纹理和遮挡区域表现不佳，单目方法虽有上下文但缺乏几何精度。本文重新思考单目深度嵌入，通过减少分支耦合防止捷径学习，并构建软约束以提高对单目深度误差的容忍度。该方法提升了立体匹配的泛化能力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 立体匹配在无纹理和遮挡区域表现不佳，单目方法虽有上下文但缺乏几何精度。本文重新思考单目深度嵌入，通过减少分支耦合防止捷径学习，并构建软约束以提高对单目深度误差的容忍度。该方法提升了立体匹配的泛化能力。

quick_skim.title: DGSfM: Depth-Guided Scale-Aware Global Structure-from-Motion
quick_skim.abstract: Global Structure-from-Motion (SfM) is an efficient paradigm for recovering camera poses and sparse 3D structure from unordered images. However, its reliance on scale-ambiguous epipolar geometry makes global positioning sensitive to noisy baseline estimates and weak view-graph constraints, while false edges from visually ambiguous pairs can further degrade reconstruction. We propose DGSfM, a depth-aware global SfM pipeline that uses monocular depth maps as a scalable prior while preserving explicit multi-view optimization. For each image pair, we use a depth-aware relative pose solver to convert scale-ambiguous epipolar constraints into scale-aware relative pose constraints. We further improve robustness through view-graph filtering and depth-consistency-based correspondence pruning, which suppress false edges and matches that remain plausible under epipolar geometry alone. Finally, global scale averaging and depth-guided pose-point initialization align monocular depth maps into a common reconstruction scale and provide stable initialization for global positioning and bundle adjustment. Experiments on ETH3D and IMC2021 show that DGSfM consistently improves over strong global SfM baselines across sparse and dense matching front-ends, achieving substantial gains in pose accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/sithu31296/DGSfM.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: depth-guided SfM for efficient large-scale reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 深度引导的SfM用于高效大规模重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 深度引导的SfM用于高效大规模重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 深度引导的SfM用于高效大规模重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DGSfM uses monocular depth maps as scalable priors to convert scale-ambiguous epipolar constraints into scale-aware pose estimates, improving robustness and efficiency for large-scale 3D reconstruction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 全局运动恢复结构（SfM）在大规模无序图像重建时面临尺度模糊和不稳定。本文提出DGSfM，通过整合单目深度图作为可扩展先验，将尺度模糊的对极几何转为尺度感知约束，并结合视图图滤波和深度一致性校验，有效提升了鲁棒性和重建精度。实验表明，该方法在多个基准上取得了最优性能，为高效大规模3D重建提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 全局运动恢复结构（SfM）在大规模无序图像重建时面临尺度模糊和不稳定。本文提出DGSfM，通过整合单目深度图作为可扩展先验，将尺度模糊的对极几何转为尺度感知约束，并结合视图图滤波和深度一致性校验，有效提升了鲁棒性和重建精度。实验表明，该方法在多个基准上取得了最优性能，为高效大规模3D重建提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Incremental Online Scene Reconstruction by 3D Gaussian Triangulation
quick_skim.abstract: Incremental scene reconstruction is essential for real-world applications. Although 3D Gaussian Splatting shows strong potential, most existing approaches require offline conversion of the optimized Gaussians into an intermediate implicit field for explicit mesh extraction, which hinders seamless integration with downstream tasks. To address this limitation, we propose a novel online framework that incrementally reconstructs and updates high-fidelity explicit meshes by directly triangulating a dense geometric Gaussian representation, which supports both high-quality rendering and incremental surface reconstruction. Moreover, we present a direct meshing algorithm that efficiently extracts and updates the mesh from the Gaussian set. To ensure mesh accuracy, we enforce a plane-based pulling constraint that dynamically aligns 3D Gaussian primitives to the approximated local surface. Furthermore, our framework significantly reduces memory and computational overhead during long-sequence processing by dynamically freezing fully optimized historical regions. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms conventional Gaussian-based methods on both rendering quality and reconstruction accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: incremental online scene reconstruction using 3D Gaussian triangulation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用3D高斯三角化进行增量在线场景重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用3D高斯三角化进行增量在线场景重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用3D高斯三角化进行增量在线场景重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes an online framework that incrementally reconstructs and updates high-fidelity explicit meshes by directly triangulating dense geometric Gaussian representations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D高斯溅射方法需离线转换，无法在线集成到下游任务。本文提出直接三角化密集几何高斯表示的在线框架，实现高质量渲染和增量表面重建。提出高效网格提取和更新算法，确保准确性。实验表明该方法在实时场景重建中达到高质量。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有3D高斯溅射方法需离线转换，无法在线集成到下游任务。本文提出直接三角化密集几何高斯表示的在线框架，实现高质量渲染和增量表面重建。提出高效网格提取和更新算法，确保准确性。实验表明该方法在实时场景重建中达到高质量。

quick_skim.title: Dynamic Inverse Rendering for Enhanced Material-Lighting Decomposition
quick_skim.abstract: Decomposing outgoing surface radiance into material and illumination during inverse rendering is essential for applications such as relighting and augmented reality, yet it is severely ill-posed since multiple combinations can result in the same observed colour. Capturing an object under multiple lighting conditions usually helps resolve this ambiguity as it constrains the optimization towards correct solutions. In this work, we explore the potential of reconstructing rigidly moving objects -- which provides observations of diverse light-surface interactions -- to resolve the material-lighting ambiguity in inverse rendering. For this purpose, we introduce a relightable approach that marries object tracking and reconstruction with inverse rendering for general rigidly moving objects. Our experimental analysis on synthetic data demonstrates that motion can be an advantage for disentangling material and lighting: the reconstructed material is significantly more accurate when the object is observed under rigid motion than when it is static. Moreover, results on RGB videos of real hand-held objects show that our pipeline preserves this advantage even under noisy real-world conditions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: reconstructing 3D objects from images via inverse rendering
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过逆渲染从图像重建三维对象
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过逆渲染从图像重建三维对象
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过逆渲染从图像重建三维对象
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This work explores using rigidly moving objects observed under multiple lighting to resolve material-lighting ambiguity, marrying object tracking and reconstruction with inverse rendering for relightable 3D reconstruction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 逆渲染中材质与光照分解的歧义性问题依然挑战。本文利用刚性运动物体在多光照下的观测来消歧，将物体跟踪重建与逆渲染结合，提出可重光照的三维重建方法。实验表明该方法在分解精度和重光照效果上取得进展，为从图像序列重建三维对象并分解材质与光照提供了新方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 逆渲染中材质与光照分解的歧义性问题依然挑战。本文利用刚性运动物体在多光照下的观测来消歧，将物体跟踪重建与逆渲染结合，提出可重光照的三维重建方法。实验表明该方法在分解精度和重光照效果上取得进展，为从图像序列重建三维对象并分解材质与光照提供了新方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images

quick_skim.title: 3D Scene Graph Prediction: Generating Hierarchical Models from Partially Observed Environments
quick_skim.abstract: Generating realistic 3D indoor scenes is an area of growing interest in computer vision and robotics. Existing methods, often motivated by applications such as interior design, generally focus on object layout generation within a single room. The generation of high-level scene structure, such as room-level layout and traversability, remains underexplored despite its importance for robotics applications. In this paper, we consider the case where a robot has explored part of an environment and needs to predict the unexplored parts to support downstream tasks such as exploration or object search. We propose a top-down framework for synthesizing hierarchical 3D scene graphs, including a room layer -- describing the floor plan and traversability -- and an object layer modeling object layouts within each room. For the room layer, we propose a novel mixed-domain graph diffusion model jointly predicting room categories, floor boundaries, and traversability between rooms. Via corruption and masking, this model supports partial constraints such as incomplete floor plans, avoiding the need for partially observed training data. For the object layer, we integrate an existing mixed discrete-continuous diffusion model for joint prediction of object categories, locations, sizes, and orientations within each room given the floor plan. We compare our method with state-of-the-art occupancy-based and LLM-based floor plan generation methods on a standard benchmark. Compared with an occupancy-based learning baseline, our method generalizes substantially better to out-of-distribution partial floor plans. We also demonstrate our integrated prediction pipeline on real-world scenes from robot-collected data, enabling prediction beyond explored areas.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Generating hierarchical 3D scene graphs from partial observations, relevant to generative 3D modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图，属于生成式3D建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图，属于生成式3D建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从部分观测生成层次化3D场景图，属于生成式3D建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a top-down framework for synthesizing hierarchical 3D scene graphs, predicting room layout and traversability from partially explored environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D场景生成多聚焦于单房间物体布局，缺乏高层结构预测。本文考虑机器人已探索部分环境后的场景预测任务，提出自顶向下的框架生成层次化3D场景图，包括房间层（描述平面图和可通行性）和物体层。该方法利用部分观测推理未探索区域的结构，支持下游探索和物体搜索任务。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有3D场景生成多聚焦于单房间物体布局，缺乏高层结构预测。本文考虑机器人已探索部分环境后的场景预测任务，提出自顶向下的框架生成层次化3D场景图，包括房间层（描述平面图和可通行性）和物体层。该方法利用部分观测推理未探索区域的结构，支持下游探索和物体搜索任务。

quick_skim.title: Revisiting Matching Response and Swept Feature Volumes for Wide-baseline Omnidirectional Stereo
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we propose a training strategy for confidence estimation in omnidirectional stereo, targeting the ambiguous matches that frequently occur in wide-baseline setups. Reinterpreting the matching responses produced by the 3D encoder decoder block, we show that their expectation values provide intrinsic confidence signals. Building on this, our method directly penalizes ambiguous responses without auxiliary heads, multi-pass inference, or additional modules, resulting in more efficient and generalized predictions. Beyond confidence, we introduce swept feature volume resampling, where response features produced by 3D CNNs are resampled using regressed positive matching indices and then processed by 2D CNNs to predict meta-information such as surface normals. This joint learning introduces auxiliary geometric regularization and improves depth coherence by leveraging additional contextual cues during response aggregation stage. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach enhances both confidence estimation and surface normal prediction while maintaining deployment practicality for autonomous mobility applications.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward 3D CNN for stereo matching and depth estimation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈3D CNN用于立体匹配和深度估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前馈3D CNN用于立体匹配和深度估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前馈3D CNN用于立体匹配和深度估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This work improves confidence estimation in wide-baseline omnidirectional stereo by reinterpreting matching responses and using swept feature volume resampling, enabling efficient depth predictions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 宽基线全向立体中模糊匹配导致深度估计不准确。本文提出基于3D编码器-解码器匹配响应期望值的置信度训练策略，并引入扫描特征体积重采样。该方法无需额外模块即可直接惩罚模糊响应，提升了预测的准确性和泛化能力。实验表明其在多个数据集上表现优异。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 宽基线全向立体中模糊匹配导致深度估计不准确。本文提出基于3D编码器-解码器匹配响应期望值的置信度训练策略，并引入扫描特征体积重采样。该方法无需额外模块即可直接惩罚模糊响应，提升了预测的准确性和泛化能力。实验表明其在多个数据集上表现优异。

quick_skim.title: SalientGS: Unified SfM-to-3DGS with Importance-Guided MCMC Gaussian Allocation
quick_skim.abstract: Reconstructing 3D scenes from unordered images remains bottlenecked by expensive Structure-from-Motion (SfM) preprocessing and frozen pose interfaces. We present SalientGS, a unified SfM-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) pipeline. Its central contribution is importance-guided Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) Gaussian allocation, which aggregates multi-view residuals into per-Gaussian underfit and redundancy signals. These signals define a smooth importance-weighted sampling distribution that biases both birth and relocation toward underfit regions. This reallocates capacity from well-fit areas without altering the underlying stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD). SalientGS achieves end-to-end reconstruction in 15 minutes with state-of-the-art perceptual quality. The supplementary material provides dedicated sections for Per-Scene Qualitative Comparisons and Per-Image Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS) Analysis, including failure cases. Code and evaluation scripts are available at https://github.com/Six-Bit-TX/SalientGS.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: unified SfM-to-3DGS pipeline for efficient end-to-end 3D scene reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 统一的SfM到3DGS管线用于高效端到端3D场景重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 统一的SfM到3DGS管线用于高效端到端3D场景重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 统一的SfM到3DGS管线用于高效端到端3D场景重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SalientGS integrates SfM and 3D Gaussian Splatting into an end-to-end pipeline using importance-guided MCMC Gaussian allocation, achieving state-of-the-art reconstruction in 15 minutes.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 从无序图像重建3D场景通常需要昂贵的SfM预处理和固定位姿接口。本文提出SalientGS，将SfM和3D高斯泼溅统一为端到端管线，核心是重要性引导的MCMC高斯分配，通过多视图残差信号自适应分配高斯容量。该方法在15分钟内完成端到端重建，在多个基准上达到最优质量，大大降低了3D场景重建的实践门槛。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 从无序图像重建3D场景通常需要昂贵的SfM预处理和固定位姿接口。本文提出SalientGS，将SfM和3D高斯泼溅统一为端到端管线，核心是重要性引导的MCMC高斯分配，通过多视图残差信号自适应分配高斯容量。该方法在15分钟内完成端到端重建，在多个基准上达到最优质量，大大降低了3D场景重建的实践门槛。

quick_skim.title: CASA-SDF: Curriculum-Aware Spatial Adaptation with Curvature-Guided Density for Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: Neural implicit representations have emerged as a powerful paradigm for 3D reconstruction. However, high-fidelity indoor surface reconstruction remains a significant challenge, primarily due to the pronounced \emph{geometric heterogeneity} of indoor scenes. Large texture-less planar regions typically require stronger regularization to suppress high-frequency artifacts, while thin structures demand sharper, more adaptive representations to mitigate the spectral bias of multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) and prevent over-smoothing. Existing approaches often rely on spatially indiscriminate prior supervision and a scene-global SDF-to-density transformation, which constrains their ability to balance planar smoothness and detail preservation. In this paper, we propose CASA-SDF (Curriculum-Aware Spatial Adaptation for SDF), a unified framework that addresses this challenge via complementary adaptations of supervision and representation capacity. Specifically, Hybrid Spatially-Adaptive Uncertainty Annealing (SAUA) fuses semantic and photometric uncertainties to construct a pixel-wise curriculum for monocular prior supervision. This strategy maintains regularization in reliable regions while attenuating unreliable supervision early in training to enable data-driven photometric refinement. Meanwhile, Curvature-Aware Locally Adaptive Density Transformation (CALADT) progressively modulates the sharpness of the SDF-to-density mapping via a curvature proxy to enhance the representation of thin structures. Extensive experiments on benchmark indoor datasets demonstrate that CASA-SDF improves surface completeness and detail recovery on high-frequency structures, without compromising the stability of planar surfaces.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: optimization-based 3D reconstruction representative for comparison with feed-forward
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于优化的3D重建方法，可用于与反馈前向方法对比
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于优化的3D重建方法，可用于与反馈前向方法对比
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于优化的3D重建方法，可用于与反馈前向方法对比
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CASA-SDF proposes a neural implicit surface reconstruction method with curriculum-aware spatial adaptation and curvature-guided density to handle geometric heterogeneity in indoor scenes, serving as a strong optimization-based baseline for feed-forward vs optimization studies.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: CASA-SDF提出了一种课程感知空间自适应与曲率引导密度的神经隐式表面重建方法，针对室内场景几何异质性（大面积无纹理平面和薄结构）进行平衡。该方法通过自适应正则化和MLP频谱偏差缓解，实现了高保真重建。作为基于优化的方法，它为研究前馈与优化3D重建的对比提供了有力基线。实验在多个数据集上展示了优于现有方法的性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: CASA-SDF提出了一种课程感知空间自适应与曲率引导密度的神经隐式表面重建方法，针对室内场景几何异质性（大面积无纹理平面和薄结构）进行平衡。该方法通过自适应正则化和MLP频谱偏差缓解，实现了高保真重建。作为基于优化的方法，它为研究前馈与优化3D重建的对比提供了有力基线。实验在多个数据集上展示了优于现有方法的性能。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: feed forward vs optimization based 3D reconstruction

quick_skim.title: FoundationGeo: Learning Spatial Pixel-Wise Fields for Monocular Metric Geometry
quick_skim.abstract: We present FoundationGeo, a two-stage framework that explicitly bridges relative and metric prediction via spatial calibration and principled data design. Stage 1 learns a high-fidelity, affine-invariant geometry model by initializing with DINOv3 and training on a curated 10.2M-sample multi-domain corpus with complementary local-detail supervision, yielding sharp boundaries and strong cross-domain generalization. Stage 2 moves beyond global scaling by introducing lightweight pixel-wise calibration fields for metric estimation: a scale field for spatially varying metric alignment and a ray-direction correction field that mitigates directional bias in point-map geometry, together producing metrically consistent 3D point maps. Beyond model design, we identify camera intrinsic coverage, especially focal length distribution mismatch between training and test data, as a key bottleneck for zero-shot metric generalization: performance drops sharply when test intrinsics fall outside the training distribution. To address this, we synthesize additional training data across diverse focal lengths using a Blender-based data engine, repairing under-covered focal regimes and improving robustness under intrinsic shift. Extensive zero-shot evaluations across seven benchmarks show that FoundationGeo significantly strengthens cross-domain robustness, staying near the top across diverse domains while avoiding the sharp cross-domain performance drops observed in other methods. This consistency translates into the best overall performance, surpassing heavier baselines by over 5.2% on average.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: pixel-wise fields for monocular metric geometry using feed-forward framework
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈框架的单目度量几何像素级场
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前馈框架的单目度量几何像素级场
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前馈框架的单目度量几何像素级场
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: FoundationGeo learns pixel-wise calibration fields for metric depth and point-map from a single image, using a two-stage feed-forward approach with DINOv3 initialization and 10.2M multi-domain data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 单目度量几何预测面临相对预测与度量预测的鸿沟。FoundationGeo提出两阶段前馈框架：第一阶段学习高保真仿射不变几何模型，第二阶段引入轻量像素级校准场实现度量对齐和射线方向校正。在10.2M多领域数据上训练，生成度量一致的3D点图。该方法在多个基准上取得先进结果，为前馈3D几何预测提供了可扩展范例。

quick_skim.title: UniMedSeg: Unified In-Context Learning for Multi-Paradigm 2D/3D Medical Image Segmentation
quick_skim.abstract: Medical image segmentation foundation models are expected to generalize across diverse clinical scenarios, yet existing universal methods remain fragmented by prompt paradigms and spatial dimensions. Visual in-context learning, interactive segmentation, and language-guided segmentation are typically handled by paradigm-specific models, while 2D and 3D images are also modeled separately. Such isolation prevents heterogeneous annotations and data from being jointly absorbed by a single scalable model and limits cross-paradigm knowledge transfer. To address this bottleneck, we propose UniMedSeg, a Transformer-centric universal segmentation framework that maps visual examples, geometric interactions, language instructions, and 2D/3D images into a shared sequence space, enabling heterogeneous medical supervision to be jointly learned through a unified in-context interface without prompt- or dimension-specific branches. To overcome the long-sequence memory bottleneck caused by visual contexts, we introduce Decoupled Split Attention, which reduces attention complexity to linear while preserving hardware-friendly computation and focused context-target interaction. Extensively trained and evaluated on a large corpus curated from 27 public datasets, UniMedSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance across visual in-context, interactive, and language-guided segmentation without task-specific fine-tuning, demonstrating strong generalization on diverse held-out tasks. The code and model weights are publicly available at https://github.com/Lii1228/UniMedSeg
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 统一的2D/3D医学图像分割框架

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: UniMedSeg proposes a Transformer-centric universal segmentation framework that handles 2D/3D medical images across various prompt paradigms, enabling cross-paradigm knowledge transfer.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有医学图像分割方法因提示范式和空间维度而异，限制了知识迁移。UniMedSeg提出以Transformer为核心的统一框架，能够处理视觉示例、几何交互、语言指令等多种提示，并统一2D/3D图像。实现了跨范式知识融合，提高了分割的泛化能力。

quick_skim.title: Bake It Till You Make It: Ultrafast Spatial Texture-Atlas Splatting
quick_skim.abstract: Recent extensions of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) capture fine color details using hash-grid-based appearance parameterization but incur high computational cost during fragment rendering. We introduce a decoupled radiance representation that models low-frequency geometry and view dependent appearance features with 2D surfels while representing high-frequency textures via a view-independent spatial hash grid that is baked into a compact texture atlas. By including sparsity-enhancing optimizations that penalize semi-transparency and per-primitive falloff, our method aggressively prunes insignificant surfels and achieves significantly faster and sparser reconstructions than prior work. Exploiting geometric sparsity and efficient GPU texture mapping, our approach achieves up to a fivefold speedup over 3DGS while preserving state-of-the-art visual fidelity, enabling real-time 4K rendering at 60 FPS on consumer hardware.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D Gaussian splatting with texture atlas for rendering

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Bake It Till You Make It introduces a decoupled radiance representation that bakes high-frequency textures into a compact atlas, enabling ultrafast splatting with sparser reconstructions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对3D高斯泼溅中高计算成本问题，本文提出解耦辐射表示，将低频几何和视点相关外观建模到2D surfels，高频纹理烘焙到紧凑纹理图谱。通过稀疏性增强优化，显著提升了重建速度和稀疏度，实现了超快速的纹理图谱泼溅。

quick_skim.title: ARDepth: Auto-regressive Monocular Depth Estimation with Progressive Visual Conditioning
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion models have recently become the dominant paradigm for monocular depth estimation (MDE). However, they implicitly assume that depth can be recovered as a globally smooth field through iterative denoising, which does not explicitly reflect the piecewise and scale-dependent organization of scene geometry. In practice, geometric structure emerges progressively across spatial scales, where coarse layout, surfaces, and boundaries are constructed in a hierarchical manner. Motivated by this observation, we introduce ARDepth, which formulates depth estimation as structured auto-regressive generation. Instead of recovering depth through global refinement, ARDepth progressively constructs depth representations as spatial resolution increases. To support this generative process, we introduce Scale-Progressive Conditioning (SPC) to inject multi-scale visual features at each generation stage, and Semantic-Aware Guidance (SAG) to provide scene-level semantic priors that enhance global structural consistency. Together, these designs enable the model to capture fine-grained local details while maintaining coherent global geometry. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach achieves strong performance and produces structurally consistent depth predictions across scales, validating auto-regressive generation as a promising alternative paradigm for geometric modeling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: auto-regressive depth estimation for direct pixel-to-geometry mapping
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自回归深度估计实现从像素到几何的直接映射
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自回归深度估计实现从像素到几何的直接映射
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自回归深度估计实现从像素到几何的直接映射
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ARDepth formulates monocular depth estimation as structured auto-regressive generation, progressively constructing depth representations with increasing spatial resolution, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on multiple benchmarks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 单目深度估计通常假设深度为全局平滑场，忽略了结构的层次性。本文提出ARDepth，将深度估计建模为结构化自回归生成，逐步从粗到细构建深度表示。该方法不使用全局扩散，而是通过渐进式视觉条件控制空间分辨率递增，在多个标准数据集上取得了最优性能，且推理效率更高，为从单图直接获得高质量3D几何提供了新框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 单目深度估计通常假设深度为全局平滑场，忽略了结构的层次性。本文提出ARDepth，将深度估计建模为结构化自回归生成，逐步从粗到细构建深度表示。该方法不使用全局扩散，而是通过渐进式视觉条件控制空间分辨率递增，在多个标准数据集上取得了最优性能，且推理效率更高，为从单图直接获得高质量3D几何提供了新框架。
